name: Dimo
subtitle: Spend, budgets & bills
promotionalText: A calm way to track spending, budgets, and recurring bills.
description:
Dimo helps you track everyday spending without the clutter.

• Log expenses quickly with categories and payment methods
• See budgets and where money goes
• Keep recurring bills in view
• Review activity and stats over time

Built for personal use — data stays on your device and syncs privately to your account when you sign in.

appPrivacy.notes: Do not declare “Data Not Collected”. Disclose account/contact info (WorkOS name/email), user content (expenses, budgets, recurring, lending), and identifiers needed for sync. Native iOS does not embed Vercel Analytics; the hosted privacy policy covers web Analytics/Speed Insights separately. Point Privacy Policy URL at /privacy.

required: Also capture 6.7" / 6.5" if App Store Connect prompts for them
